def solve(prices, strategy, k)
    n = prices.length
    original_profit = 0
    n.times do |i|
        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
    end

    m = k / 2

    A = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
    B = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

    prefixA = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefixB = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefixA[i+1] = prefixA[i] + A[i]
        prefixB[i+1] = prefixB[i] + B[i]
    end

    max_delta = -Float::INFINITY

    (0... (n - k + 1)).each do |i|
        start1 = i
        end1 = i + m - 1
        start2 = i + m
        end2 = i + k - 1

        sumA = prefixA[end1 + 1] - prefixA[start1]
        sumB = prefixB[end2 + 1] - prefixB[start2]

        delta = sumA + sumB
        max_delta = delta if delta > max_delta
    end

    if max_delta > 0
        original_profit + max_delta
    else
        original_profit
    end
end

    n = prices.length
    original_profit = 0
    n.times do |i|
        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
    end

    m = k / 2

    A = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
    B = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

    prefixA = Array.new(n + 1, 0)

    end

    if max_delta > 0
        original_profit + max_delta
    else
        original_profit
    end
end
